title: swagger type mismatch for the /libpod/networks/json endpoint
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

The documentation https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#operation/libpodListNetwork  indicates the `/libpod/networks/json` endpoint should returns a `[{ Bytes: Array of integers <uint8> }]`, but the actual response is different.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Query the `/libpod/networks/json` endpoint

**Describe the results you received:**

The endpoint returns:

```json
[{
    "Bytes": "base64-encoded-json-object",
    "Name": "quickstrom"
}]
```

Once decoded, the bytes value is `{"capabilities":{"portMappings":true},"type":"portmap"}`


**Describe the results you expected:**

The endpoint should have returned the documented `#/definitions/NetworkListReport` swagger ref, e.g.:

```json
[{
    "Bytes": [0],
    "Name": "quickstrom"
}]
```

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Ok lets close this as fixed in current release.
